'''Jinet''' was an uninhabited<ref name="FBS">''[[Flashpoint! Brak Sector]]''</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Jinet system/Legends|Jinet system]] of the [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] established a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] base on the planet shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="CSWE" /> The base was home to a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]].<ref name="FBS" />
